onboarding.page1_subtitle: Mix text, images, voice, and checklists in a single rich note.
onboarding.page2_subtitle: Summarize long notes, extract tasks, and transcribe voice in Arabic and English.
onboarding.page3_subtitle: Offline-first with secure cloud sync. Your ideas stay with you.
onboarding.p1_desc: Notes, lists, photos, videos, voice memos, and files — together in one note. Color them, pin what matters, and tag for quick search.
onboarding.p2_desc: Summarizes your notes, pulls out tasks, turns your voice into text, and reads text from images. All in one tap.
onboarding.p3_desc: Works without internet and syncs when back online. Encrypt private notes, and collaborate with friends on the same note via QR.

about.hero_subtitle: A calm, private space for your thoughts.
about.intro: Nawa (نواة) means 'core' or 'nucleus' in Arabic — the seed from which every great idea grows. We built Nawa for people who think deeply, write often, and value their privacy.
about.mission_body: To give every Arab and Gulf user a beautifully crafted, privacy-first space to capture their thoughts — that works flawlessly offline and in their native language.
about.value_privacy: Privacy first — your notes belong to you, not us.
about.value_offline: Offline-first — write anywhere, sync when you're ready.
about.value_arabic: Arabic-native — built for RTL from day one, not bolted on.
about.value_quality: Craft over speed — every detail matters.
about.credits_body: Designed and developed by Mohamed Hamid, a software engineer passionate about building tools that respect users.

privacy.intro: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains what data Nawa collects, how we use it, and the choices you have. We follow GDPR, CCPA, and Saudi PDPL standards.
privacy.section_collect_account: Account data: Email address, display name, and profile photo (only if you provide one). For guest accounts, we generate an anonymous ID with no personal information.
privacy.section_collect_content: Your content: Notes, attachments (images, audio, video, files), tags, and reminders. This content is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and stored on Google Firebase servers.
privacy.section_collect_device: Device data: We collect anonymous diagnostics — app version, device model, OS version, and crash reports — to fix bugs. We never collect your contacts, location, or browsing data.
privacy.section_use_body: We use your data only to: (a) provide and improve Nawa; (b) sync your notes across devices you authorize; (c) send notifications you've enabled; (d) prevent abuse and security threats. We never sell, rent, or share your personal data with advertisers.
privacy.section_ai_body: When you use AI features (summarize, extract tasks, voice-to-text, OCR), the relevant content is sent to Google Gemini API for processing. Google does not retain or train on this data per their API agreement. AI features are optional and can be disabled in Settings.
privacy.section_ads_body: Free tier shows ads from Google AdMob. AdMob may collect device identifiers to serve relevant ads. Premium subscribers see no ads. You can opt out of personalized ads in your device settings.
privacy.section_security_body: Notes marked as 'encrypted' use AES-256-CBC encryption with a key derived from your passphrase. Even we cannot read encrypted notes. Biometric authentication adds a second layer when enabled.
privacy.section_rights_body: You can: (a) export all your data anytime; (b) delete your account permanently in one tap (Settings → Account → Delete Account); (c) request a copy of your data; (d) opt out of analytics. Account deletion is immediate and irreversible — all notes, files, and credentials are erased within 30 seconds.
privacy.section_children_body: Nawa is not intended for users under 13. We do not knowingly collect data from children. If you believe a child has registered, contact us and we'll delete the account.
privacy.section_changes_body: We'll notify you in-app at least 14 days before any material change. Continued use after changes means you accept them.
privacy.section_contact_body: Questions about your privacy? Email us at

terms.intro: By using Nawa, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully — they protect both you and us.
terms.section_account_body: You must be at least 13 years old to use Nawa (16 in the EU). You're responsible for keeping your password safe and for everything that happens under your account. One person, one account.
terms.section_use_body: Don't use Nawa to: (a) violate any law; (b) infringe someone else's rights; (c) upload illegal, harmful, or malicious content; (d) spam, harass, or abuse other users; (e) reverse engineer the app; (f) sell or transfer your account. We may suspend accounts that violate these rules.
terms.section_content_body: You own everything you create in Nawa. By using our service, you grant us a limited license to store, sync, and display your content — only to provide the service. We never use your content for marketing or AI training.
terms.section_subscription_body: Nawa Premium is billed monthly or yearly. Subscriptions auto-renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the renewal date through your App Store or Google Play account. Refunds follow the platform's policies.
terms.section_termination_body: You can delete your account anytime in Settings. We may terminate accounts that violate these terms after notice (except for severe violations). Upon termination, your data is permanently deleted within 30 days.
terms.section_disclaimer_body: Nawa is provided 'as is' without warranties. While we work hard to keep your data safe and the service running, we cannot guarantee 100% uptime or zero data loss. We strongly recommend keeping your own backups of irreplaceable content.
terms.section_liability_body: To the extent permitted by law, our total liability is limited to what you paid us in the past 12 months. We're not liable for indirect or consequential damages.
terms.section_law_body: These terms are governed by the laws of Saudi Arabia for users in the GCC, and by the laws of your country of residence elsewhere. Disputes are resolved in good faith first; otherwise in the courts of Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
terms.section_changes_body: We may update these terms occasionally. We'll notify you in-app 14 days before changes take effect.

contact.hero_subtitle: We read every message. Usually we reply within 24 hours.
contact.section_support_body: Having a problem? Found a bug? Need help with a feature?
contact.section_developer_body: Nawa is built by Mohamed Hamid, a passionate software engineer.
contact.section_social_body: Stay updated on new features and tips.

data_usage.hero_subtitle: Full transparency on where your data lives and how it moves.
data_usage.section_local_body: All your notes are stored locally first using Hive (encrypted local database). This is what makes Nawa work offline — nothing depends on the cloud to function.
data_usage.section_cloud_body: Notes sync to Google Firebase Firestore (Saudi Arabia data center, me-central1) under your account. Only you can read your notes — protected by Firestore Security Rules.
data_usage.section_attachments_body: Media files are uploaded to Cloudinary's secure CDN. Each file is tied to your user ID. Free tier includes 25GB storage.
data_usage.section_ai_body: When you use AI features, your text is sent to Google Gemini API. Google does NOT retain or train on this data. Processing happens in milliseconds, then your data is discarded.
data_usage.section_metrics_body: We collect anonymous app usage data (which screens are visited, crash reports) via Firebase Analytics to improve Nawa. No personal data, no tracking across apps.
data_usage.section_offline_body: Without internet, you can still: create notes, edit, search, view all blocks. Changes queue locally and sync automatically when you reconnect.
data_usage.section_export_body: You can export any note as PDF, text, or share via WhatsApp/Telegram/Email. Full export of your account is available on request — email us.
data_usage.section_delete_body: Settings → Account → Delete Account. This removes: notes (Firestore), files (Cloudinary), profile (Firestore), local data (Hive), and authentication (Firebase Auth). Process completes in under 30 seconds. There is no recovery.

subscription_terms.intro: Nawa offers Free and Premium tiers. Premium unlocks advanced features through a subscription.
subscription_terms.section_plans_body: Free: 50 notes, basic features, ads. Premium Monthly: $4.99/month. Premium Yearly: $39.99/year (save 33%). Lifetime: $99 one-time.
subscription_terms.section_premium_includes: Unlimited notes, all AI features (summarize, extract tasks, OCR, voice-to-text), encrypted notes, no ads, 10GB storage, priority sync, custom themes, collaboration on notes.
subscription_terms.section_billing_body: Subscriptions are charged through Apple App Store or Google Play. Payment is taken at confirmation of purchase. Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. The renewal charge will be the same as the previous period unless we notify you otherwise.
subscription_terms.section_cancel_body: Cancel anytime from your App Store or Google Play account settings. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period — you keep Premium features until then. Cancelling does not delete your data.
subscription_terms.section_refund_body: Refunds are handled by Apple and Google per their policies. Apple: contact App Store Support. Google: requestable from Google Play within 48 hours of purchase.
subscription_terms.section_trial_body: If we offer a free trial, you'll be charged automatically when the trial ends unless you cancel before then. The trial is available once per user.
subscription_terms.section_changes_body: We may change prices with at least 30 days notice. Existing subscribers keep their original price for the current billing period. You can cancel before any price change takes effect.
subscription_terms.section_family_body: Premium can be shared with up to 5 family members through Apple Family Sharing or Google Family Library at no extra cost.
subscription_terms.section_contact_body: For subscription questions, email us at
